title: Midnight Melt Vegan Delight
description: A garlicky and flaky midnight craving dish featuring soured cream and chive dip, perfect for a vegan dinner.

ingredients.name: Vegan cheese
ingredients.notes: Use any vegan cheese you like

ingredients.name: Flaky pastry dough (homemade or store-bought)
ingredients.notes: Make sure to let it rest at room temperature before rolling out

instructions: Mix together the vegan cheese, garlic powder, and a pinch of salt in a large bowl. Add the chives and stir well.
Divide the cheese mixture into two equal parts. Spoon one part onto half of the pastry sheet, then cover with the other half so you have a sealed pocket of filling.
Brush edges lightly with water to seal the pockets, place on an oven-safe baking sheet lined with parchment paper, and sprinkle the remaining soured cream evenly over the top.
Bake for 20 minutes or until golden brown. Let cool slightly before serving with fresh chives as a garnish.
Serve hot as an appetizer or main course, paired with your favorite side dishes.
